calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Gordon Yamamoto, Esq. for Plaintiff: Don Y. Kim, also present, was sworn & examined.
Exhibit 1-Promissory Noter dtd. 9-1-02------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Chong Y. Kim as follows:
Damages of $90,333.33
Attorney's fees of $2,300.00
Costs of $790.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
